_meta.description: Canvas style library for Little Souls portraits — EXPANDED master bank (gallery 35 curated + global art + spiritual). Each style = a Codex render brief. Powers FB/library + pawtraits slideshow engine.

fine-art-photoreal.label: Fine-Art Photoreal
fine-art-photoreal.render_brief: Fine-art realistic pet portrait made for canvas. Believable pet anatomy, natural fur detail, accurate eyes, shallow depth of field, soft studio or window light, clean painterly photographic finish. Pet-only Type A portrait, no people, no hands, no room scene, no canvas object, no readable text, no watermark. Must look like a premium realistic canvas portrait, not glossy plastic AI art.

studio-canvas-realism.label: Studio Canvas Realism
studio-canvas-realism.render_brief: Premium studio-realistic canvas portrait. Pet is photographed/painted realistically against a simple tonal backdrop with professional lighting, sharp eyes, tactile fur detail, and subtle canvas-print sensibility. Pet-only Type A portrait, no people, no room, no physical canvas in shot, no readable text, no watermark. Avoid over-smoothed fur, perfect symmetry, and generic AI glamour.

cinematic-character-realism.label: Cinematic Character Realism
cinematic-character-realism.render_brief: Realistic cinematic pet portrait with character styling. Believable fur, natural eyes, costume or prop details integrated like a premium film still, dramatic but tasteful lighting, shallow depth and canvas-ready finish. Pet-only Type A portrait, no people, no room, no physical canvas, no readable text, no watermark. Use archetypes only; no recognisable film/TV/game/comic IP.

natural-light-canvas.label: Natural-Light Canvas
natural-light-canvas.render_brief: Natural-light realistic pet portrait for canvas. Soft outdoor or window light, believable coat texture, relaxed pet expression, clean background, gentle depth of field, premium editorial realism. Pet-only Type A portrait, no room set, no people, no phone snapshot comedy, no physical canvas object, no readable text, no watermark.

watercolour-floral.label: Watercolour Floral
watercolour-floral.render_brief: Soft watercolour painting with washy edges. Pet rendered with gentle pigment fades, warm cream paper background. Wildflowers (lavender, daisies, cornflowers, soft yellows) wrap loosely around the lower half of the composition. Pet's eyes carry the most detail. Pet name written in handwritten cursive serif at the bottom centre. Frame: thin warm-wood floater frame.

oil-on-linen.label: Oil on Linen
oil-on-linen.render_brief: Classical oil painting style on visible linen weave. Low-key chiaroscuro — dramatic single-source light from one side, deep shadows on the opposite. Warm muted background (burnt sienna, deep umber). Pet rendered with thick brushstroke texture, especially in fur and around eyes. Pet name in tasteful serif at bottom right. Frame: dark walnut with subtle gilt inner edge.

soft-pastel.label: Soft Pastel
soft-pastel.render_brief: Pastel chalk on textured paper. Soft, tender rendering — feathered edges, no hard lines. Warm cream-pink background. Pet's grey muzzle and eyes get the most detail; the rest fades into the cream. Pet name in handwritten cursive at bottom left. Frame: pale cream with soft gilt edge — gentle, not heavy.

renaissance-oil.label: Renaissance Oil
renaissance-oil.render_brief: Aged oil painting in the manner of 17th-century Dutch animal portraiture. Pet rendered with dignity and weight — head and chest filling the frame, eyes catching a single highlight. Background: deep velvet green or claret, slight visible canvas weave. Pet name in formal Roman serif on a small brass plaque at bottom. Frame: ornate gilt with carved corner detail.

pop-art.label: Pop Art
pop-art.render_brief: Andy Warhol-style four-panel grid OR single-panel high-contrast pop. Bright saturated palette — magenta, cyan, yellow, orange. Bold black outlines around pet shape. Background flat colour, no gradient. Pet name in chunky sans-serif caps at bottom. Frame: clean black floater.

royal-oil.label: Royal Oil
royal-oil.render_brief: Pet dressed in mock-historical royal regalia (crown, cape, ruff) painted in the style of a court portrait. Heavy oil texture, gold-trimmed accents. Deep maroon or navy background. Pet's expression dignified — never silly. Pet name in elaborate serif at bottom. Frame: heavy carved gilt.

cowboy-poster.label: Cowboy Poster
cowboy-poster.render_brief: Old west wanted-poster aesthetic. Sepia-toned, distressed paper texture. Pet centred, eyes intense. Bold serif headline at top ('WANTED' or pet name in caps). Subtitle below in smaller western type. Frame: dark distressed wood, slightly rough edges.

folk-linocut.label: Folk Linocut
folk-linocut.render_brief: Hand-carved folk linocut print. Bold black carved linework, visible ink grain, limited palette of cream, navy, rust, ochre, and warm tan. Decorative folk motifs can frame the pet, but the pet remains the subject. Pet-only Type A portrait, no room, no canvas object, no physical frame, no readable text.
